# AR Marketing

> AR Marketing runs Meta and Instagram ad campaigns, builds the websites those ads point to, and automates lead follow-up, booking, and reporting — bundled as one system for Southern California small businesses (Los Angeles, Orange County, Riverside, and beyond).

Founded and run directly by Alex Ramirez — every client works with him personally, not an account manager. Real client case studies (with names and phone numbers) are listed on the homepage.

## Packages

- [Core Package](https://www.armarketingteam.agency/core-package.html): Meta & Instagram ads, website design, and automation, bundled together. Month-to-month, no contract.
- [Full Package](https://www.armarketingteam.agency/full-package.html): Everything in Core, plus an AI Agent that handles lead conversations automatically, included.
- [Website Package](https://www.armarketingteam.agency/website-package.html): A custom-built, conversion-focused website with no ad management required. Automation and the AI Agent are available as add-ons later.
- [CRM Package](https://www.armarketingteam.agency/crm-package.html): CRM, pipeline tracking, missed-call text-back, automated follow-up, booking, and review management — no website or ads required.

## Other pages

- [Homepage](https://www.armarketingteam.agency/): Overview, real client case studies with names and phone numbers, and FAQ.
